summary: Comprehensive testing of QueueIt Analytics Dashboard and Starter Kit features. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified admin login, analytics dashboard with all visualizations (stats cards, top songs, hourly/daily charts, recent activity), and Starter Kit page with all 4 print material buttons. Mobile view tested with analytics tab working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview with auth returns valid stats (total_requests, total_played, requests_today, unique_songs, unique_requesters)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-songs without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-songs with auth returns list with song name, artist, count
Backend: GET /api/analytics/hourly without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/hourly with auth returns 24-hour distribution
Backend: GET /api/analytics/daily without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/daily with auth returns 7-day activity
Backend: GET /api/analytics/recent without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/analytics/recent with auth returns activity list with song_name, action, timestamp
Backend: GET /api/queue returns queue list
Backend: GET /api/queue/current returns current song
Backend: POST /api/queue/add adds song and logs to analytics
Backend: /admin route exists (returns 200)
Frontend /admin (desktop): Login with hostel2024 succeeds
Frontend /admin (desktop): Dashboard loads with 3 stat cards (NOW PLAYING, IN QUEUE, TOTAL PROCESSED)
Frontend /admin (desktop): QR Generator section visible
Frontend /admin (desktop): Starter Kit button visible with text 'OPEN STARTER KIT — STICKERS, POSTERS, BROCHURE'
Frontend /admin (desktop): Analytics Dashboard component visible
Frontend /admin (desktop): Analytics stats visible (TOTAL REQUESTS, PLAYED, TODAY, UNIQUE GUESTS)
Frontend /admin (desktop): Top Songs section visible
Frontend /admin (desktop): Hourly chart visible
Frontend /admin (desktop): Daily chart visible
Frontend /admin (desktop): Recent Activity section visible
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: Page loads with Cyberpunk theme (yellow/black/cyan)
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: Venue Name input visible and functional
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: QR STICKERS button visible and enabled
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: STANDING CARD button visible and enabled
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: A4 POSTER button visible and enabled
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: TRI-FOLD BROCHURE button visible and enabled
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: Print Instructions section visible
Frontend /admin/starter-kit: Back button navigates to admin
Frontend /request: Customer page loads without errors
Frontend /request: QUEUEIT branding visible
Frontend /request: SEARCH, BROWSE, QUEUE tabs visible
Frontend /request: Current playing section visible
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): Mobile tab bar visible with PLAYER, QUEUE, STATS, QR, SYS tabs
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): Analytics tab (STATS) shows all analytics data
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): QR tab shows Starter Kit button

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all features verified on desktop and mobile)

seed_data_creation: Test song 'Test Analytics Song' added during testing - queue cleared after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics endpoints fully tested: /api/analytics/overview, /api/analytics/top-songs, /api/analytics/hourly, /api/analytics/daily, /api/analytics/recent. All require Bearer token auth (password 'hostel2024'). Starter Kit page at /admin/starter-kit has 4 print buttons that open new windows (window.open) - may be blocked by automated browsers but buttons are clickable. Analytics data is logged when songs are added to queue via POST /api/queue/add. Mobile view has 5 tabs: PLAYER, QUEUE, STATS (analytics), QR, SYS. Set localStorage 'queueit_onboarding_done' to 'true' to skip onboarding tutorial.
